title: Tridophyllum rivale
taxonomy: Tridophyllum rivale is classified as a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Tridophyllum, which is a part of the order Polypodiales. The species is native to Southeast Asia, specifically in countries such as Thailand and Vietnam. The classification of Tridophyllum rivale is based on its morphological characteristics, including its leaf shape and venation pattern. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification and relationships of this species.
